query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `skin_preferences` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `tenantCompanyId` int NOT NULL,
  `skin` enum('axiom','hubspot','salesforce','pipedrive','zoho','gohighlevel','close') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'axiom',
  `migratedFrom` enum('hubspot','salesforce','pipedrive','zoho','gohighlevel','close','spreadsheet','other'),
  `graduatedToAxiom` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `graduatedAt` bigint,
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `custom_field_defs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `tenantCompanyId` int NOT NULL,
  `objectType` enum('contact','company','deal','lead','activity','custom_object') NOT NULL,
  `fieldKey` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `label` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `fieldType` enum('text','number','currency','date','datetime','boolean','select','multiselect','url','email','phone','textarea','user','company','contact') NOT NULL,
  `options` json,
  `isRequired` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `isSearchable` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `displayOrder` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `groupName` varchar(128),
  `sourceSystem` varchar(64),
  `sourceFieldId` varchar(256),
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `custom_field_values` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `tenantCompanyId` int NOT NULL,
  `fieldDefId` int NOT NULL,
  `objectType` enum('contact','company','deal','lead','activity','custom_object') NOT NULL,
  `recordId` int NOT NULL,
  `valueText` text,
  `valueNumber` double,
  `valueBoolean` boolean,
  `valueDate` bigint,
  `valueJson` json,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `custom_object_defs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `tenantCompanyId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `namePlural` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `icon` varchar(64),
  `color` varchar(32),
  `sourceSystem` varchar(64),
  `sourceObjectId` varchar(256),
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `custom_object_records` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `tenantCompanyId` int NOT NULL,
  `objectDefId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(512),
  `ownerId` int,
  `sourceRecordId` varchar(256),
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `activity_history` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `tenantCompanyId` int NOT NULL,
  `activityType` enum('email_sent','email_received','call','meeting','note','task','stage_change','field_change','deal_created','contact_created','file_upload','sms','linkedin','import') NOT NULL,
  `objectType` enum('contact','company','deal','lead','custom_object') NOT NULL,
  `recordId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int,
  `subject` varchar(512),
  `body` text,
  `direction` enum('inbound','outbound'),
  `durationSeconds` int,
  `outcome` varchar(128),
  `fromEmail` varchar(320),
  `toEmail` varchar(320),
  `fromField` varchar(256),
  `toField` varchar(256),
  `metadata` json,
  `occurredAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `sourceSystem` varchar(64),
  `sourceActivityId` varchar(256),
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `field_mapping_templates` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `tenantCompanyId` int NOT NULL,
  `sourceSystem` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `mapping` json NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL
);
